content:
我们很久没有腾出空来整体维护相位对弈了！

这段时间设计师尝试了一些有趣的概念、命轮能力、交互方式。然而我们在整理后发现整体环境已经大幅偏离预期，节奏变快，克制变重，新卡牌越来越强力，逐渐失去了相位对弈在攻防交换上精细的乐趣风味。

我们会在后续的版本更新中进行大幅数值向下调整，目标是将这些新的有趣体验保留的同时尽可能还原相位对弈原初的风味。

与此同时，轮选模式、密码对战模式、战斗回放也在顺利开发中！后续我们还将计划加入观战模式，来尽可能支持大家举办相位对弈的相关比赛活动。我们还计划加入唤醒体与唤醒体之间在相位对弈中的小对话，来看看他们能够产生什么有趣的碰撞！


未来，相位对弈、长肉鸽模式会与幻梦深潜一样视为一种周常奖励活动，大家可以自由选择喜欢的玩法参与。一次性奖励内容也会始终在那里等着大家有空再去完成。

欢迎大家提供任何关于相位对弈的更多意见或反馈！

We haven’t had the bandwidth to do a full maintenance pass on Traphase for a long time!

During this period, our designers tried some interesting concepts, Wheel abilities, and interaction patterns. However, after reviewing everything, we found that the overall environment has drifted far from our original expectations: the pace has sped up, counters have become heavier, and new cards keep getting stronger—gradually eroding the delicate back-and-forth fun that defined Traphase.

In upcoming updates, we’ll be making significant downward tuning to the numbers. Our goal is to preserve the new, interesting experiences while restoring as much of Traphase’ original flavor as possible.

Meanwhile, Draft mode, Password Match mode, and Battle Replay are progressing smoothly in development! We’re also planning to add Spectator Mode to better support community-run Phase Duel tournaments. In addition, we plan to add short dialogues between Awakeners within Traphase to see what fun interactions emerge.

Looking ahead, Traphase and the Long Roguelike mode will be treated as weekly reward activities—just like Dream Deep Dive—so you can freely choose the modes you enjoy. One-time rewards will remain available and wait for you to complete them whenever you have time.

We welcome any and all suggestions or feedback about Traphase!
thread_title: 前瞻：相位对弈改动 Traphase Changes
